list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Update image icon widths in README instructions
Adjusted the widths of the file and add code icons in the README for improved visual clarity. This ensures better alignment and consistency in the documentation layout.

task.summary:
Add introductory notebooks for Python and pandas basics
Created two new Jupyter notebooks: one for basic Python concepts and another for introductory data manipulation with pandas. These notebooks include explanatory content, examples, and exercises for new learners.

Remove .venv directory from the repository
The .venv directory is unnecessary and should be excluded from version control. This prevents accidental commits of local virtual environment files.

Remove "Beginning with Python" Jupyter notebook.
The notebook "1. Beginning with Python.ipynb" has been deleted. It is no longer needed or has been replaced by other materials in the project. This improves the repository's organization and ensures only relevant files are retained.

Update dependencies in requirements.txt
Removed unused or outdated dependencies to streamline the file. Updated `jupyterlab`, `pandas`, `numpy`, and `matplotlib` to their latest versions for compatibility and improved functionality.

Remove .vscode/settings.json file.
Deleted the VSCode settings file to clean up the repository. The removed file contained editor configurations and Python-specific settings, which may no longer be relevant or required. This simplifies the repo and avoids unintentional overrides of local editor preferences.

Remove pre-commit hooks, `.python-version`, and poetry setup.
This commit removes configuration files related to pre-commit hooks, `.python-version`, the `linestripper.py` utility script, and the `poetry.lock` file. These deletions indicate a shift in tooling or project configuration, streamlining the codebase.
Update the use of load magic to provide solution to a more direct "cat" approach, instructions has also be updated

Update README with simplified Miniconda-based environment setup
Replaced pip-tools and pyenv setup instructions with a clearer guide for using Miniconda. This ensures easier environment management for attendees, reducing complexity and improving accessibility for both Windows and Unix users. Updated the contact method to use email directly for inquiries.

Update CHANGELOG for version 2.0.0 release
Added details of version 2.0.0, which simplifies setup and improves accessibility by restructuring notebooks. Notable changes include using `!cat` to load solutions, ensuring compatibility across different environments.

Add Google Colab setup instructions to README
Included step-by-step instructions for setting up the workshop in Google Colab, complete with visual aids and example scripts. Added all related media assets to the repository to support these instructions.

Update image icon widths in README instructions
Adjusted the widths of the file and add code icons in the README for improved visual clarity. This ensures better alignment and consistency in the documentation layout.

MESSAGE.value:
Add introductory notebooks for Python and pandas basics
Created two new Jupyter notebooks: one for basic Python concepts and another for introductory data manipulation with pandas. These notebooks include explanatory content, examples, and exercises for new learners.

Remove .venv directory from the repository
The .venv directory is unnecessary and should be excluded from version control. This prevents accidental commits of local virtual environment files.

Remove "Beginning with Python" Jupyter notebook.
The notebook "1. Beginning with Python.ipynb" has been deleted. It is no longer needed or has been replaced by other materials in the project. This improves the repository's organization and ensures only relevant files are retained.

Update dependencies in requirements.txt
Removed unused or outdated dependencies to streamline the file. Updated `jupyterlab`, `pandas`, `numpy`, and `matplotlib` to their latest versions for compatibility and improved functionality.

Remove .vscode/settings.json file.
Deleted the VSCode settings file to clean up the repository. The removed file contained editor configurations and Python-specific settings, which may no longer be relevant or required. This simplifies the repo and avoids unintentional overrides of local editor preferences.

Remove pre-commit hooks, `.python-version`, and poetry setup.
This commit removes configuration files related to pre-commit hooks, `.python-version`, the `linestripper.py` utility script, and the `poetry.lock` file. These deletions indicate a shift in tooling or project configuration, streamlining the codebase.

Remove introductory content from Python notebook.
Removed excess instructional and introductory text, focusing the notebook on practical Python exercises. This streamlines the content for a more concise and hands-on learning experience.
Update the use of load magic to provide solution to a more direct "cat" approach, instructions has also be updated

Update README with simplified Miniconda-based environment setup
Replaced pip-tools and pyenv setup instructions with a clearer guide for using Miniconda. This ensures easier environment management for attendees, reducing complexity and improving accessibility for both Windows and Unix users. Updated the contact method to use email directly for inquiries.

Update CHANGELOG for version 2.0.0 release
Added details of version 2.0.0, which simplifies setup and improves accessibility by restructuring notebooks. Notable changes include using `!cat` to load solutions, ensuring compatibility across different environments.

Add Google Colab setup instructions to README
Included step-by-step instructions for setting up the workshop in Google Colab, complete with visual aids and example scripts. Added all related media assets to the repository to support these instructions.

Update image icon widths in README instructions
Adjusted the widths of the file and add code icons in the README for improved visual clarity. This ensures better alignment and consistency in the documentation layout.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Update image icon widths in README instructions
Adjusted the widths of the file and add code icons in the README for improved visual clarity. This ensures better alignment and consistency in the documentation layout.
